subcodes.first_line: O kind friend! In these days there is clamor for armistice, and the murmur of reconciliation rises as the forces of the world yearn for peace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یار مهربانا این ایام ولوله متارکه است و زمزمه مصالحه قوای عالم آشتی طلبد
subcodes.subjects: @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @war and peace
